title: Lamine Yamal, Soccer Star and Son of African Migrants, Personifies a Changing Spain
summary_full: As he prepares for the World Cup final, Lamine Yamal, 19, is at the heart of a national debate about what it means to be Spanish in an increasingly multicultural society.
summary_public: As he prepares for the World Cup final, Lamine Yamal, 19, is at the heart of a national debate about what it means to be Spanish in an increasingly multicultural society.
